channel.title: Nishon Notes
channel.description: Geospatial software engineering notes by Nishon Tandukar on GeoAI workflows, geospatial data pipelines, geoprocessing, open mapping, and spatial data systems.

item.title: Building a Public Nepal Earthquake Dataset
item.description: Turning Nepal's published earthquake records into a reusable, automated dataset for maps, analysis, and research.

item.title: Finding Nepal's Local Level from a Coordinate
item.description: Using FlatGeobuf and a Shapely spatial index to identify a Gaupalika or Nagarpalika from coordinates.

item.title: Visualizing Pathfinding on OpenStreetMap
item.description: Watching BFS, Dijkstra, A*, and Greedy Best-First Search move through real road networks.

item.title: Testing Semantic Change Detection with Aerial Image Captions
item.description: Testing what Moondream2 captions and sentence embeddings can say about change between two LEVIR-CD aerial images.
